languages.title: Afaan
languages.subtitle: Afaan guutummaa appii keessatti fayyadamtu filadhu.
languages.noResults: Afaan barbaacha kee wajjin walsimu hin jiru.

phone.label: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa
phone.searchCountry: Biyya, koodii, ykn durtii bilbilaa barbaadi
phone.noCountries: Biyyoonni barbaacha kee wajjin walsimu hin jiru.
phone.tooShort: Lakkoofsi bilbilaa kun baay’ee gabaabaa dha.
phone.tooLong: Lakkoofsi bilbilaa kun baay’ee dheeraa dha.
phone.invalid: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa sirrii biyya filatameef galchi.

auth.onboardingTagline: Yeroowwan “Nagaa dha” fi “Gargaarsa barbaada” gidduu jiruuf hiriyyaa nageenya dhuunfaa.
auth.createSubtitle: Giraafii nageenya kee eeguuf mala galmee filadhu.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Mallattoo xumuruu hin dandeenye. Walitti hidhamiinsa kee ilaalii irra deebi'ii yaali.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kutaa misooma naannoo fayyadamuu. Native Google Sign-In ijaarsa misoomaa keessatti hojjeta.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Amma wal-qabsiisi ykn itti fufii booda itti dabali.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 kan uffatamu taphoota fi sochii dhiibbaa dheeraatiin dhangala’aa nageenyaa kakaasuu danda’a.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Hiriyaa nageenyaa kee lallaafaan kaartaa irratti fi bilbila keessatti.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear haala manaa, haala eegduu, haala hatattamaa, bilbila sababa, fi deeggarsa sagalee gargaaruu danda'a.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Kaartaa, naannoo balaa, dhufaatii nageenya qabu, fi SOS haala jiruuf kan oolu.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving eegdonni bakka gargaarsi barbaachisuu akka danda’u hubachuu akka danda’aniif bakka gaafata. Kana booda Sajoo keessatti jijjiiruu dandeessa.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Beeksisni galmee fi taateewwan hatattamaa ni deeggara.
permissions.notificationsBody: Nuti beeksisa kan fayyadamnu gaaffii nageenyaa, fooyya’iinsa hatattamaa, fi yaadachiisa ati dandeessifte qofaaf.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Iddoon haala nageenyaa sirrii ta’ee eega
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving bakka kee kaartaa nageenyaa, naannoo balaa, qooda ariifataa, fi SOS haalataaf fayyadama. Kana booda Sajoo keessatti jijjiiruu dandeessa.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yaadachiisa galmee, fooyya'iinsa hatattamaa, fi gaaffii nageenyaa ati dandeessifte erga. Beeksisaaf beeksisa hin fayyadamnu.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving maaykiroofoonii kee kan fayyadamu yeroo AI hiriyyaa ykn bilbila nageenyaa jalqabdu qofa.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth kan uffatamu kee walitti hidha
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving Bluetooth fayyadama faaya NorthStar waliin wal-qabsiisuuf, haala walqabsiisaa dubbisuuf, fi dhangala'aa nageenyaa kan uffatamu irraa kakaasuuf.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving kaameraa kan fayyadamu yeroo suuraa piroofaayilii kaasuu ykn suuraa nageenyaa qooduu filattan qofa.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving dhangala'aa kana Sajoo fi daashboordii irraa akka argamu taasisa.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Sagalee hiriyyaa dhaga’uuf nageenyi itti dhaga’amu filadhu.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Namoota amanamoo ta’aniif haala dubbii qooduu.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Taappeen shan gara SOS fi akeekkachiisa eegduutti ol guddachuu danda’a.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Haala mijataa hin taane keessaa ba’uuf sababa ayyaanaa uumuu.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Yeroo deeggarsa barbaaddu bilbila hiriyyaa yeroo dhugaa jalqabi.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Dhangala’iinsa nageenyaa demoo dhiibbaa gadi aanaa keessatti yaali.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Yeroo scan gootu faaya naannoo kee kaa’i.
jewelry.noDevices: Meeshaaleen NorthStar dhiyoo jiran hanga ammaatti hin argamne.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning jalqabuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.
jewelry.scanFailed: Faaya dhiyoo jiru argachuu hin dandeenye. Bluetooth mallatteessi, NorthStar cufi, irra deebi'ii yaali.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning jalqabuu hin dandeenye. Bluetooth qaqqabummaa ilaaliitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Qabeenyi meeshaa dhiyoo jiru cufaadha. Sajoo keessatti Bluetooth qaqqabummaa hayyami, sana booda irra deebi'ii yaali.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar wal qunnamsiisuuf yeroo dheeraa fudhate. Itti dhiheessii irra deebi'ii yaali.
jewelry.connectFailed: NorthStar waliin wal qunnamsiisuu hin dandeenye. Chaarjii fi dhiyoo ta'uu isaa mirkaneessi, sana booda irra deebi'ii yaali.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Hanga ammaatti meeshaaleen dhiyoo hin jiran
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar chaarjii fi bilbila kanaaf dhihoo ta'aa, sana booda irra deebi'aa scan godhaa.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Meeshaalee NorthStar naannoo keessan jiran barbaadaa jirtu...

home.subtitle: Daashboordii hiriyyaa nageenyaa
home.readyBody: Sagalee, kaartaan, faaya, fi eegdonni tapha tokko fagaatu.

map.title: Kaartaa nageenyaa
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go dursee ilaaluu; Mapbox ijaarsa guddinaa keessatti agarsiisa.
map.updateFailed: Iddoo keessan haaromsuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.
map.notRequested: Bakka argachuun hin gaafatamin ture. Booda Sajoo irraa dandeessisuun ni danda'ama.
map.permissionOff: Bakka itti argamu cufaadha. Kaartaa nageenyaa si irratti akka giddu galeessa godhatu Sajoo keessatti dandeessisi.
map.timeout: Iddoon kee kan eegame caalaa yeroo dheeraa fudhachaa jira. Mallattoo ifa ta'een bakka tokkotti socho'ii irra deebi'ii yaali.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Hanga ammaatti bakka qusatame hin jiru
map.savedEmptyMessage: Iddoowwan amanamoo ati qusatte saffisaan argachuuf asitti ni mul’atu.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Hiriyaa sagalee keessanii wajjin haala gaariin wal qunnamsiisuu...
safetyCall.reconnect: Sagalee AI waliin irra deebi'ii walqabsiisi.
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Yeroo qophooftu bilbila jalqabi ykn ergaa barreessi.

history.clearMessage: Kun ergaawwan hiriyyaa AI kuufaman meeshaa kana irraa ni haqa.
history.title: Seenaa haasawa
history.subtitle: AI ergaawwan hiriyyaa meeshaa kana irratti kuufamaniiru.
history.emptyMessage: Haasaan hiriyyaa AI kee bilbila jalqabaa booda asitti ni mul’ata.
history.loadFailed: Seenaa haasawa fe'uu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.
history.clearFailed: Seenaa haasawa qulqulleessuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.
history.deleteFailed: Haasaa sana haquu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.

voices.title: Sagaleewwan waamicha nageenya koo
voices.subtitle: Sagalee hiriyyaa dhaga’uuf sirrii ta’ee itti dhaga’amu filadhu.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Maaloo sagalee sana irra deebi'ii filachuuf yaali.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Saamuda sagalee kun taphatamuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.

boyfriend.name: Jaalallee jaalallee
boyfriend.description: dhaabbataa, jaalala kan qabu, kan argamu

muscleMan.name: Nama maashaa
muscleMan.description: ofitti amanamummaa kan qabu, kan eegu, kan nama kakaasu

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Yeroo mirkaneessi neetworkiin ykn Hume hin jirretti deebii hiriyyaa walitti qabame fayyadami.
settings.privacyBody: Deetaa naannoo meeshaa kana irratti kuufame erguu ykn haquu.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Yeroo ammaa kana deetaa kee erguu hin dandeenye.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Kun piroofaayilii kee, qindaa'inoota, quunnamtii hatattamaa, seenaa haasawa, yaadachiisa hayyamaa, fi turtii mirkaneessuu naannoo kee meeshaa kana irraa haqa.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Yeroo ammaa kana deetaa naannoo haquu hin dandeenye.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Filannoo sana qusachuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Kutaan kee ammallee sochiirra jira. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.

contacts.title: Qunnamtii hatattamaa
contacts.subtitle: Yeroo dhangala’aa nageenyaa namoota amanamoo ta’an ni argamu.
contacts.name: Maqaa
contacts.empty: Hanga ammaatti quunnamtiin hatattamaa hin dabalamne.
contacts.emptyTitle: Hanga ammaatti quunnamtiin hatattamaa hin jiru
contacts.emptyMessage: Yeroo dhangala’aan nageenyaa isaan barbaadu qophaa’aa akka ta’uuf nama itti amantu itti dabali.
contacts.removeMessage: Namni kun kana booda dhangala’aa hatattamaa keessan keessatti hin mul’atu.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Qunnamtii kana qusachuu hin dandeenye. Bal'ina isaa ilaalaa irra deebi'aa yaalaa.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Qunnamtii kana balleessuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'ii yaalaa.

friends.title: Hiriyyoota
friends.subtitle: Eegdota, gaaffii, fi giraafii balaa tasaa.
friends.emptyMessage: Hiriyoonni fi eegdonni amanamoo ta’an erga dabalamanii booda asitti ni mul’atu.

emergency.title: Yeroo muddamaa SOS .
emergency.subtitle: Yeroo deeggarsa hatattamaa barbaaddu qofa guddifadhu.
emergency.body: Kun dhangala’aa nageenya keessanii ni beeksisa, quunnamtii hatattamaa ni qopheessa.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stab qoodinsa iddoo qophaa'eera. Hidhamtoota kallattiin erguuf qabxii xumura qooda duubaa walqabsiisi.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tuqi
capybearTap.subtitle: Burtukaana nageenyaa gadi dhiisuuf NorthStar kee dachaa lama tuqi.
capybearTap.body: Daandiin sochii qaamaa waayirii taatee BLE tiif qophaa’eera.

errors.voiceOffline: Ati sarara ala fakkaatta. Ergaan keessan yeroo deebitee wal qunnamtan ni ergama.
errors.voiceQueued: Ergaa qusatameera. Yeroo hiriyyaan sagalee deebi'ee wal qunnamu ni ergama.
errors.voiceRetrying: Irra deebi'ee ergaa kee erguuf yaalaa jirta...
errors.voiceConnecting: Hiriyaa sagalee keessanii wajjin haala gaariin wal qunnamsiisuu...
errors.microphone: Bilbila sagaleedhaaf maaykiroofooniin barbaachisaadha. Sajoo keessatti dandeessisuun ni danda'ama, ykn bakka isaa ergaa barreessuu dandeessa.
errors.billing: Hiriyaan sagalee toora interneetii yeroodhaaf hin argamu. Hiriyaa sarara ala jiru waliin itti fufuu dandeessu.
errors.authentication: Hiriyaan sagalee turtii kana mirkaneessuu hin dandeenye. Ammas galmaa'i ykn ammaaf hiriyyaa sarara ala jiru fayyadamaa.
errors.timeout: Hiriyaan sagalee deebii kennuudhaaf yeroo dheeraa fudhate. Walitti hidhamiinsa kee ilaalii irra deebi'ii yaali.
errors.network: Hiriyaa sagalee bira gahuu hin dandeenye. Walitti hidhamiinsa kee ilaali, sana booda irra deebi'ii yaali ykn sarara ala itti fufi.
errors.genericVoice: Wanti tokko bilbila sagalee addaan kute. Irra deebi'ii yaali, ykn hiriyyaa sarara ala jiruun itti fufi.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving nageenyaaf maaykiroofooniin fayyadamuu fi AI bilbila hiriyyaa barbaada.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving bakka jirtu kaartaa nageenyaa fi amaloota nageenya dhiyoo jiraniif fayyadama.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving Bluetooth fayyadamuun faaya nageenyaa NorthStar kee waliin wal qunnamsiisa.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Filannoon seensaa kun ijaarsa kana keessatti hin jiru.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Haalli agarsiisaa daataa sobaa naannoo qofa fayyadama. Tajaajiloonni walqabatan eenyummeeffamanii hin jiran; yeroo appichi irra deebi'ee fe'amu turtiin kun ni haaromfama.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Koodiin mirkaneessaa sirrii miti ykn yeroon isaa darbeera. Koodii haaraa gaafadhuutii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Yaaliin seensaa baay'ateera. Xiqqoo eegi, sana booda irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Mirkaneessuun seensaa yeroo dheeraa fudhate. Walqunnamtii kee ilaaliitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Tajaajila seensaa bira ga'uu hin dandeenye. Walqunnamtii kee ilaaliitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Turtiin kee xumurameera. Irra deebi'ii seeni.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Kaartaan nageenyaa fe'amuu hin dandeenye. Walqunnamtii kee ilaaliitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Bakki yeroo ammaa hin jiru. Bakka kee dhumaa %{capturedAt} irratti kuufame agarsiisaa jira.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Bakka kee qooduu hin dandeenye. Hayyama bakka ilaaliitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Bakki koo dhumaa kuufame, %{capturedAt} irratti galmaa'e kunooti:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Hayyamni Bluetooth cufameera. Qindaa'inoota keessatti baniitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth dhaameera. Baniitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Walitti hidhuun Bluetooth meeshaa ykn ijaarsa kana irratti hin jiru.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: NorthStar argachuu hin dandeenye. Dhiheenyatti qabi, Bluetooth ilaaliitii irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Meeshaaleen NorthStar dhihoo jiran hin argamne. Dhiheenyatti qabiitii irra deebi'ii barbaadi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: NorthStar waliin walqunnamsiisuu hin dandeenye. Chaarjii qabaatee dhihoo akka turu godhi, sana booda irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Bakka kana kuusuu hin dandeenye. Irra deebi'ii yaali.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Bilbila lakkoofsa galchu banameera; bilbiluun hin mirkanoofne.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Namni yeroo muddamaa quunnamamu hin jirre; bilbilli hin godhamne.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Bilbila lakkoofsa galchu banuu hin dandeenye; bilbilli hin godhamne.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Yaaliin SOS inni dhumaa mirkanaa'uu hin dandeenye.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Hiriyyaan sagalee amma hin jiru. Booda irra deebi'ii yaali ykn hiriyyaa sarara alaatiin itti fufi.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
